documentation_impact.rationale: Phase 4 prelude registers the five PRD §11 MVP pipelines (feature-delivery, chat-with-persona, knowledge-curation, init-greenfield, adopt) under /src/pipelines/ as YAML documents that load through @pancreator/pipeline.loadPipelineYaml and compile through compilePipeline. Adds /src/pipelines/README.md as the authoring index. These are the structural prerequisite for the Phase 4 dogfood walkthrough.

deferred_items.rationale: compilePipeline returns the structural ordered surface; LangGraph StateGraph compile lands in Phase 5 self-hosted milestone.
Persona Ensemble runtime is M4+ per PRD §13; the chat-with-persona pipeline carries the single-stage skeleton until then.
Cron cadence is backlog-tracked automation work per BOOTSTRAP §6.1; agents trigger this pipeline on demand for now.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Slice stages diffs locally and preserves the §4 delegation rule by routing stages to named personas via metadata.persona; the supervisor enforces gates at the ship stage.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Each pipeline carries dual-anchor citations to PRD/BOOTSTRAP/AGENTS.md so future runtime adapters can locate authority.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Slice satisfies PRD §11 MVP pipeline registration and BOOTSTRAP Phase 4 first bullet (compile and register the five MVP pipelines) without expanding scope past the YAML registration surface.
